name: Beef Fajitas
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Sirloin Flank Or Round Steak, cut into thin strips
1 Cup Slivered Green or Red Peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Wrap tortillas in foil and place in a large non-stick skillet over medium heat for 5 minutes, turning once.
2. Remove the skillet from heat and turn it to high. Add oil.
3. Add beef; cook and stir about 2 minutes.
4. Add peppers and onion; cook, stirring, for an additional 3 minutes or until tender.
5. Stir in salsa and cumin and heat through.
6. Fill tortillas with the beef mixture; sprinkle with desired toppings and serve immediately.
Suggested toppings: sour cream, guacamole, salsa, cheddar cheese
